    S

    scale(double) - Method in record class primitives.Double3
    Multiplies all components of this triad by a scalar value.
    scale(double) - Method in class primitives.Vector
    Scales this vector by a scalar value.
    Sphere - Class in geometries.impl
    Class Sphere represents a sphere in 3D space.
    Sphere(Point, double) - Constructor for class geometries.impl.Sphere
    Constructor for sphere.
    subtract(Double3) - Method in record class primitives.Double3
    Subtracts another triad from this triad component-wise.
    subtract(Point) - Method in class primitives.Point
    Subtracts another point from this point and returns the vector from the other point to this point.
